tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – December 2025. Steven Weiss, Financial Liaison. This report presents preliminary 2025 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review.

payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – December 2025
payload.description: Preliminary 2025 results compared to the November Forecast, subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The logo for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) is a blue circle with the white letters "MTA" inside.

tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Steven Weiss, Financial Liaison
tool_args.raw_text: Steven Weiss, Financial Liaison

tool_args.label: Connecticut Department of Transportation (CDOT)
tool_args.raw_text: CDOT

tool_args.label: Total Revenue YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $1,030.1 million was $38.1 million lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Total Ridership YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Through December 2025 ridership was 71.4 million, 6.0% above 2024, 17.5% below 2019 pre-COVID levels and 0.5% below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue of $664.5 million was $3.3 million higher than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Total Expenses before Non-Cash Liability Adjustments YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $1,928.0 million were $56.6 million or 2.9% favorable to the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Total Headcount December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of December, total headcount was 6,714, which was 181 lower than the Forecast of 6,895.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date December Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 48.7%, which was higher than the Forecast due to higher farebox revenue.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Cost per Passenger YTD November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date November Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $21.84, which was lower than Forecast.

tool_args.label: Revenue per Passenger YTD November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date November Revenue per Passenger was $9.31, which was lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Commutation Ridership YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 27.8 million was 10.5% above 2024 and 2.7% below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Non-Commutation Ridership YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Non-commutation ridership of 43.6 million was 3.3% above 2024 and 1.0% above the Forecast.

tool_args.label: December YTD Non-Reimbursable Operating Result
tool_args.raw_text: December YTD non-reimbursable operating results were $105.8 million or 7.8% favorable to the Forecast.

payload.raw_value_text: $105.8 million or 7.8% favorable to the Forecast

tool_args.label: December 2025 Monthly Farebox Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North farebox revenue totaled $59.0 million, which was $2.5 million or 4.5% above the Forecast.

tool_args.label: December 2025 Commutation Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation revenue of $14.8 million was $1.2 million or 7.7% below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: December 2025 Non-Commutation Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation revenue of $44.2 million was $3.8 million or 9.3% above the Forecast.

tool_args.label: December 2025 Monthly Total Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership 6.190 million in December 2025

tool_args.label: December 2025 Monthly Commutation Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation December 2.335 million ridership

tool_args.label: December 2025 Monthly Non-Commutation Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation December 3.855 million ridership

tool_args.label: YTD December 2025 Commutation Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation revenue of $184.1 million was $5.2 million or 2.7% below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: YTD December 2025 Non-Commutation Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation revenue of $480.4 million was $8.5 million or 1.8% above the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Labor Expenses YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Labor Expenses: $26.7 million favorable to the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Non-Labor Expenses YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Labor Expenses: $21.7 million unfavorable to the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Depreciation and Other Favorable Variance YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Depreciation and Other were $87.3 million favorable to the Forecast

tool_args.label: Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Underpending of $0.3M vs November Forecast through December is primarily driven by lower programmatic maintenance partially offset by higher scheduled service needs and weather emergencies.

payload.raw_value_text: Underpending of $0.3M vs November Forecast through December
